flags.summary: In-state tuition at Greensboro College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($19.0k → $21.0k).

flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Greensboro College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($19.0k → $21.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Greensboro College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Greensboro College rose 55% between 2021 and 2024 (25.7% → 39.7%).
